title: store.rs get_chats(None) has no LIMIT — unbounded result set
description: store.rs get_chats: the ids=None branch fetches all rows from the chat table with no LIMIT clause. Unlike get_contacts (LIMIT 1000) and query_contacts (LIMIT 1000), get_chats is unbounded. chat_query and chat_get both call get_chats(None); a large chat table causes an unbounded result set loaded into memory. Scenario: daemon with many spaces each having multiple channels; Chat/get ids:null loads all rows per request.
